Off Calendar Aug-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Kevin M. Sullivan of Griffin & Sullivan (369-397-2600) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Kyle Montes de Oca of the Law Offices of Roeca Haas Hager LLP (415-352-0980) appears as counsel for defendants/moving parties

Court summarizes the matter before it and states its tentative ruling to partially deny and partially grant the motion as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The cause is argued and submitted by both sides.

DEFENDANTS JEREMY KATZ, MATTHEW SHIER and PINNACLE LAW GROUP, LLP's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Of Issues is DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. Motion for summary adjudication is DENIED as to the first and third causes of action and GRANTED as to the second cause of action. Court will issue its own written order.
